text: A new language, the Mass Spectrometry Query Language (MassQL), has been introduced to query mass spectrometry data.
source_excerpt:
Here we introduce a
new language, the Mass Spectrometry Query Language (MassQL), and an
accompanying software ecosystem that addresses these issues by enabling
the community to directly query mass spectrometry data with an expressive
set of user-defined mass spectrometry patterns.

text: MassQL has been implemented in various open-source and commercial tools, improving data mining capabilities.
source_excerpt:
MassQL has been widely implemented in multiple open-source and
commercial mass spectrometry analysis tools, which enhances the ability,
interoperability and reproducibility of mining of mass spectrometry data
for the research community.

text: MassQL implements an expressive grammar to search for chemically and biologically relevant molecules in MS data.
